summary: Iteration 75: Akashic Records & Sacred Encyclopedia Features - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 28/28 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Both pages load correctly with all UI elements. Navigation: Akashic Records under Divination, Encyclopedia under Explore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 verified two new features: (1) Akashic Records - guided meditative AI conversation with 6 prompt gateways (Soul Purpose, Past Lives, Karmic Patterns, Soul Relationships, Soul Healing, Soul Gifts). Session history saved to MongoDB. (2) Sacred Encyclopedia - 12 world spiritual traditions with key concepts, sacred texts, notable figures, practices. AI-powered deep exploration available. Both features fully functional.
